project.name: world-migration-gravity
project.description: Source registry for the baseline global migration gravity data acquisition layer.

sources.description: Annual country-level covariates from the World Bank API.
Bilateral international migration flow estimates, five-year periods from 1990-1995 to 2015-2020.
UN DESA International Migrant Stock 2024 destination-origin matrix.
expected_filenames: International Migrant Stock 2024 Destination and origin.xlsx
sources.notes: The public file URL may change across revisions. Add a direct URL in config/source_overrides.json or place the workbook manually in this folder.

sources.description: CEPII gravity or GeoDist bilateral controls.
sources.notes: The download path is not stable enough to hard-code. Add a direct URL in config/source_overrides.json or place the downloaded archive manually in this folder.
